cmd:
set -e
printf '\033]9;%s\033\\' 'human-readonly started'
i=0
while true; do
  i=$((i+1))
  ts=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ 2>/dev/null || true)
  echo "human-readonly: tick=$i ts=$ts event=review_needed actor=human status=ok"
  if [ $((i % 6)) -eq 0 ]; then printf '\033]777;notify;%s;%s\033\\' 'human-readonly' "review checkpoint $i"; fi
  sleep 10
done
